nasb.text: but My lovingkindness shall not depart from him, as I took it away from Saul, whom I removed from before you.

esv.text: but my steadfast love will not depart from him, as I took it from Saul, whom I put away from before you.

cnv.text: 但我的慈愛必不離開他，像離開在你面前的掃羅一樣。

ccb.text: 但我的慈爱却不会像离开从你面前被废的扫罗那样离开他。
